shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books every day.
My favorite food is Italian cuisine.
I often go for walks in the park.
Traveling to new places excites me a lot.
Listening to music helps me relax after work.
I prefer to spend time with family on weekends.
Cooking new recipes has become a fun hobby.
I usually watch movies to unwind during the evenings.
Learning a new language can be both challenging and rewarding.
Joining a club can enhance your social life and skills.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about healthy eating.
questions: Q1: Can you share your personal experience with healthy eating?
Q2: What challenges do you face when trying to eat healthily?
Q3: In your opinion, how important is a balanced diet?
Q4: What advice would you give someone wanting to improve their eating habits?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about entrepreneurship.
questions: Q1: Can you tell me about your experience starting a business?
Q2: What challenges did you encounter during the process?
Q3: What is your opinion on the risks of entrepreneurship?
Q4: What advice would you give to aspiring entrepreneurs?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental awareness.
questions: Q1: How did you become interested in environmental issues?
Q2: What challenges do you see in promoting environmental awareness?
Q3: How important do you think it is to protect the environment?
Q4: What actions can individuals take to be more environmentally friendly?
